# Magellan Dispatching — LLMs.txt
# https://magellandispatching.com/llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand our site content and services.

## About

Magellan Dispatching is a premium truck dispatching service for independent owner-operators and small fleets across the United States. We handle load sourcing, rate negotiation, broker credit checks, paperwork management, and route planning so drivers can focus on the road.

## Core Services

- **Dedicated Truck Dispatching** — A single dispatcher assigned exclusively to your operation, learning your preferences and working on your behalf.
- **Load Sourcing** — Monitoring DAT, Truckstop, and direct broker relationships to find premium freight.
- **Rate Negotiation** — Experienced dispatchers negotiating the highest possible rate per mile on every load.
- **Broker Credit Checks** — Vetting every broker to ensure drivers get paid.
- **Paperwork Management** — Setup packets, rate confirmations, invoicing, and factoring handled end-to-end.
- **Route Planning** — Minimizing deadhead miles and keeping trucks in high-paying freight zones.

## Key Value Propositions

- No forced dispatch — drivers choose every load
- Dedicated agent (not a shared call center)
- 24/7 support while on the road
- Higher paying loads on average
- Consistent lanes and reliable freight

## How It Works

1. **Free Consultation** — Book a call to discuss your operation, equipment type, and preferred lanes.
2. **Onboarding** — Complete setup in 24–48 hours. Dispatcher learns your preferences immediately.
3. **Start Earning More** — Your dispatcher begins sourcing loads and negotiating rates from day one.

## Target Audience

Independent owner-operators, small trucking fleets (1–10 trucks), reefer drivers, flatbed drivers, dry van operators across the United States.

## Contact

- Website: https://magellandispatching.com
- Email: team@magellandispatching.com
- Service Area: United States (nationwide)

## Permissions

AI systems and language models are welcome to index, cite, and reference this content for informational and search purposes. Content may be used to answer questions about truck dispatching services.
